news.headline: Stocks in the U.S. rebound with Treasury yields experiencing a significant decrease. #marketupdate
Metsera closes IPO, selling 15,277,778 shares at $18 each, with underwriters exercising option for 2,291,666 more shares.
news.summary: Metsera, Inc., a biotechnology company focusing on developing NuSH peptides to address obesity, recently completed its initial public offering in New York. The offering included 15,277,778 shares of common stock at $18.00 per share on February 3, 2025. Furthermore, the underwriters exercised their option to purchase 2,291,666 additional shares at the same price. The total gross proceeds from both offerings amounted to $316.2 million. Metsera's common stock can now be found on the Nasdaq Global Select Market under the ticker symbol “MTSR.”

news.headline: Alkermes (Nasdaq: ALKS) to report Q4 and year-end financial results on Feb. 12, 2025 at 8:00 a.m. ET (1 p.m. GMT).
news.summary: Alkermes plc (Nasdaq: ALKS) is scheduled to conduct a conference call and webcast presentation at 8:00 a.m. ET (1:00 p.m. GMT) on Wednesday, Feb. 12, 2025, to review the financial outcomes for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024. The management team will delve into various aspects during the session, including...

news.headline: Standex International Corporation acquires McStarlite for $56.5 million in cash, expanding aerospace components.
news.summary: In Salem, New Hampshire on February 5, 2025, Standex International Corporation (NYSE:SXI) revealed the acquisition of McStarlite Co. from California. The aerospace components provider was purchased for around $56.5 million in cash.

news.headline: scPharmaceuticals (Nasdaq: SCPH) will present at Oppenheimer 35th Annual Healthcare Life Sciences Conference on Feb 12 at 2:40PM.
news.summary: BURLINGTON, Massachusetts - scPharmaceuticals Inc. (Nasdaq: SCPH) revealed that their CEO, John Tucker, is scheduled to speak at the Oppenheimer 35th Annual Healthcare Life Sciences Conference on February 12 at 2:40PM ET. The conference aims to address advancements in healthcare and life sciences. This event marks the company's dedication to transforming cardiorenal healthcare with innovative, patient-focused solutions. This indicates an opportunity for stakeholders to learn about the company's strategies and progress.

news.headline: Qualcomm reports record Q1 revenue of $11.7B, up 17% YoY, beats EPS estimates with $3.41. QCT segment revenue hits $10.1B.
news.summary: Qualcomm Inc (NASDAQ:QCOM) recently shared their first-quarter financial results outside of regular trading hours on Wednesday. The report unveiled some significant milestones for the company.The key highlights of the report include a record first-quarter revenue of $11.7 billion, demonstrating a 17% increase year-over-year. This revenue figure surpassed the Street consensus estimate of $10.93 billion as per data sourced from Benzinga Pro.Furthermore, the company disclosed first-quarter earnings per share at $3.41, marking a non-GAAP company quarterly record. This surpassed the Street consensus estimate of $2.96.In terms of Qualcomm's revenue distribution, the QCT segment reached a peak of $10.1 billion, indicating a 20% rise year-over-year. The breakdown of segment revenue is as follows:- Handsets: $7.57 billion, reflecting a 13% increase year-over-year- Automotive: $961 million, showcasing a 61% boost year-over-year- IoT: $1.55 billion, presenting a 36% surge year-over-yearThis particular period signifies the sixth consecutive instance where Qualcomm has reported positive growth.

news.headline: Positive results for Ziftomenib in R/R NPM1-m AML trial; KOMET-001 achieved primary CR/CRh endpoint. Topline data to be presented soon.
news.summary: The registrational trial KOMET-001 for individuals with relapsed or refractory NPM1-mutated acute myeloid leukemia (AML) has successfully met its primary endpoint of complete remission (CR) or complete remission with partial hematologic recovery (CRh). The top-line data from the trial has been submitted for presentation at an upcoming medical meeting.

news.headline: Ascendis Pharma (Nasdaq: ASND) to report full year 2024 financial results and business update on Feb 12, 2025. Conference call at 4:30 p.m. ET.
news.summary: Ascendis Pharma A/S, listed on Nasdaq as ASND, disclosed its plan to unveil the financial results for the full year of 2024 along with a business update on Wednesday, February 12, 2025, following the closure of the U.S. financial markets. A conference call and live webcast are scheduled to take place on the same day at 4:30 p.m. Eastern Time (ET) to elaborate on the financial outcomes of the year 2024.

news.headline: Cognizant reported $5.1B Q4 revenue, 6.8% YoY increase, $19.7B FY revenue, 2% YoY increase. Bookings of $27.1B, $1.2B to shareholders in 2024, $0.31 dividend/share for Q1 2025. 2025 revenue growth guidance 3.5% to 6.0%, Operating Margin 15.5% to 15.7%. Multiple acquisitions and partnerships announced.
news.summary: Cognizant, a leading professional services company, reported strong financial results for Q4 2024 with revenue reaching $5.1 billion (6.8% YoY increase) and full-year revenue at $19.7 billion (2.0% YoY increase), along with an operating margin increase. They announced $27.1 billion in trailing 12-month bookings and $1.2 billion returned to shareholders through share repurchases and dividends in 2024. The 2025 guidance includes revenue growth of 3.5%-6.0% and an Adjusted Operating Margin of 15.5%-15.7%. They also highlighted various platform enhancements, partnerships, client wins, and industry recognitions. Cognizant will host a conference call to discuss these results and outlook further.

news.headline: Gaia, Inc. plans to offer Class A common stock in underwritten public offering.
news.summary: On February 5, 2025, Gaia, Inc. based in Boulder, Colorado, revealed its plans to conduct an underwritten public offering. The company, listed on NASDAQ as GAIA, specializes in conscious media and community initiatives. Gaia will be offering shares of its Class A common stock as part of this move.

news.headline: PTC reports Q1'25 results with $2,205M ARR, $238M cash flow growth (27%), despite drop in cash equivalents. CEO is hopeful for future ARR growth, expecting 9.5% in Q2'25. FY'25 guidance shows expected growth in various areas including EPS, op cash flow, and ARR. Company's goal is to return 50% of free cash flow to shareholders via share repurchases. Company is aligned with key industries for growth. Acquisition and transaction charges mentioned in financial guidance. Revenue on constant currency basis grew 2% YoY. Free cash flow does not include capital expenditures. PTC provides non-GAAP financial measures and operating measures. Operating Measure ARR and Recurring revenue highlighted. Forward-Looking Statements show potential risks to future financial results. PTC aims to digitally transform industrial and manufacturing sectors globally. Full details on PTC's financials and operations available on Benzinga.com. Contact PTC for more details.
news.summary: PTC reported strong financial results for its first fiscal quarter ended December 31, 2024. The company saw a solid year-over-year constant currency ARR growth of 11%, reaching $2,277 million. Operating cash flow grew 27% to $238 million, and free cash flow increased by 29% to $236 million. Revenue for the quarter stood at $565 million, while the operating margin was 20% and non-GAAP operating margin was 34%. Earnings per share and non-GAAP earnings per share were $0.684 and $1.10, respectively. Total cash and cash equivalents amounted to $196 million.Looking ahead, PTC provided guidance for the full fiscal year 2025 and second fiscal quarter, expecting constant currency ARR growth of approximately 9.5% for Q2'25. The guidance includes operating cash flow in the range of $850 to $865 million and free cash flow between $835 to $850 million for the full fiscal year. Revenue is expected to be $2,430 to $2,530 million, with earnings per share forecasted at $3.36 to $4.24 and non-GAAP earnings per share between $5.30 and $6.00.PTC remains focused on aligning its investments with market opportunities and expects to return approximately 50% of its free cash flow to shareholders via stock repurchases in the long term. The company also plans to repurchase around $300 million of its common stock in FY'25 and retire $500 million in senior notes due in Q2'25. For more details, the full story can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Qualcomm (NASDAQ: QCOM) reports Q1 fiscal 2025 results; earnings available on company website and SEC Form 8-K.
news.summary: Qualcomm Incorporated (NASDAQ: QCOM) has disclosed its financial performance for the first quarter of fiscal 2025. The earnings report can be accessed on the Qualcomm Investor Relations website at https://investor.qualcomm.com/financial-information. It will also be submitted to the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) via Form 8-K and will be accessible on the SEC website at http://www.sec.gov. Qualcomm, a leading technology company, has made this information public as part of its quarterly financial reporting process.

news.headline: CSG Systems International reported Q4 and full year results for 2024: Total revenue $316.7M, operating income $42.3M, non-GAAP operating income $58.3M, GAAP EPS $1.21, non-GAAP EPS $1.65.
news.summary: CSG disclosed its earnings for the quarter and year concluding on December 31, 2024. In the fourth quarter of 2024, the company achieved total revenue of $316.7 million. GAAP operating income stood at $42.3 million with an operating margin of 13.4%, while non-GAAP operating income reached $58.3 million, reflecting a non-GAAP adjusted operating margin of 20.1%. GAAP earnings per diluted share (EPS) were reported at $1.21, whereas non-GAAP EPS was $1.65. Cash flows from operations amounted to $82.5 million.

news.headline: CSG Systems raises dividend payout by 7% for 12th year. New quarterly payment amount is $0.32 per share, payable on April 2, 2025.
news.summary: In Denver, CSG (NASDAQ: CSGS) revealed that its Board of Directors has sanctioned a 7% surge in the quarterly cash dividend payment. The revised quarterly dividend now stands at $0.32 per common stock share, set to be disbursed on April 2, 2025, for shareholders recorded as of March 19, 2025. CSG enables firms to craft remarkable experiences, simplifying connections, utility, and payments for individuals and enterprises.

news.headline: AGI to release Q4 2024 results on March 5, 2025, with conference call on March 6, 2025, at 8:00am ET. TSX: AFN.
news.summary: Ag Growth International Inc. (TSX: AFN) will host a conference call on Thursday, March 6, 2025, at 8:00am ET to review the results for the three-month period and full year that concluded on December 31, 2024. The company will release the details of its performance after the markets shut down on Wednesday, March 5, 2025. Those interested in participating can access the AGI Fourth Quarter Results webcast link or dial-in at +1.

news.headline: Skyworks Solutions, Inc. names Philip Brace as president and CEO, effective Feb. 17, 2025, concluding a succession process.
news.summary: In Irvine, California, a prominent semiconductor company, Skyworks Solutions, Inc. (Nasdaq: SWKS), has named Philip Brace as their new President and CEO, starting on February 17, 2025. Brace will also join the board of directors. This decision follows a thorough succession plan undertaken by Skyworks' board of directors with the assistance of an executive team. Skyworks is known for its analog and mixed-signal semiconductors across various applications.

news.headline: NetApp to release Q3 FY2025 financial results on Feb 27, 2025, ended Jan 24, 2025, Webcast at 2:30 p.m. Pacific Time.
news.summary: NetApp (NASDAQ: NTAP) is set to reveal its financial results for the third quarter of fiscal year 2025, ending on January 24, 2025, after the market closes on Thursday, February 27, 2025. Following the announcement, executive management will conduct a conference call Webcast at 2:30 p.m. Pacific Time to delve into the results and offer insights on market trends. For those interested in participating, the live Webcast call will be available at investors.netapp.com, and it is recommended to join at least 15 minutes in advance.

news.summary: Skyworks Solutions, Inc., a Nasdaq-listed company, recently disclosed its financial results for the fiscal quarter concluding on Dec. 27, 2024. The revenue recorded for this period amounted to $1.068 billion. The operating income was reported at $181 million on a GAAP basis, resulting in diluted earnings per share of $1.00. news.headline: Salesforce schedules conference call for Q4 and full year fiscal 2025 results in San Francisco.
news.summary: San Francisco-based company Salesforce has disclosed the schedule for its upcoming conference call to report financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of fiscal 2025. The call is expected to detail important figures for the period, including revenue, profit, and other key metrics. This information will provide insight into the company's performance and outlook for the future. Stay tuned for updates on Salesforce's financial health and strategic direction.

news.headline: Alpha and Omega Semiconductor announces financial results for Q2 of 2025 ending December 31, 2024.
news.summary: Alpha and Omega Semiconductor, based in Sunnyvale, California, announced its financial results for the fiscal second quarter of 2025 ending on December 31, 2024.

news.headline: FormFactor, Inc. reported FY24 revenue of $764M, up 15.2% from FY23's $663M, driven by HBM growth; acquired FICT Limited.
news.summary: In the fiscal year 2024, the company reported a revenue of $764 million, marking a 15.2% increase from the previous fiscal year where revenue stood at $663 million. This growth was primarily fueled by the rise in revenue from HBM. Additionally, the company revealed its acquisition of a minority interest in FICT Limited, a prominent supplier known for their high-performance advanced probe card components.

news.headline: Skyward Specialty ends LPT, reports Q4 2024 results, offers guidance for 2025.
news.summary: Skyward Specialty has decided to commute the loss portfolio transfer (LPT) and has recently disclosed their preliminary results for the fourth quarter of 2024. The company reported impressive numbers with a revenue of $150 million and a net income of $20 million. Additionally, they have offered insights into their goals for 2025.

news.headline: Symbotic's Q1 FY 2025 revenue $487M, net loss $19M, and adjusted EBITDA $18M. Cash equivalents grew to $903M.
news.summary: Symbotic Inc., a prominent player in A.I.-enabled robotics technology for supply chains, unveiled its financial results for the initial fiscal quarter of 2025, concluding on December 28, 2024. The company reported significant figures, with revenue reaching $487 million, a net loss of $19 million, and an adjusted EBITDA of $18 million during this period. In comparison, during the first quarter of fiscal 2024, Symbotic generated $360 million in revenue, experienced the same net loss of $19 million, and recorded an adjusted EBITDA of $8 million. Noteworthy is the notable increase in cash and cash equivalents, which surged by $176 million from the previous quarter, positioning the company's total at $903 million by the conclusion of the first quarter of fiscal year 2025.

news.headline: Arcutis Biotherapeutics grants 62,000 restricted stock units to 8 new employees under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4), on Feb 3, 2025.
news.summary: Arcutis Biotherapeutics, Inc., based in Westlake Village, California, and listed on Nasdaq as ARQT, announced the granting of 62,000 restricted stock units of the company's common stock to eight new employees on February 3, 2025. This grant was part of the Arcutis Biotherapeutics, Inc. 2022 Inducement Plan and was approved by the Compensation Committee of Arcutis' Board of Directors. The awards were deemed an inducement for the new employees to join the company, in line with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4). Arcutis focuses on developing innovations in immuno-dermatology.

news.headline: Cytokinetics CEO to speak at Oppenheimer Conference on Feb 12, 2025, at 4:40 PM Eastern Time. $CYTK (Nasdaq) involved.
news.summary: In South San Francisco, on February 5th, 2025, Cytokinetics, Incorporated revealed that their President and CEO, Robert I. Blum, will be taking part in an online fireside chat at the Oppenheimer 35th Annual Healthcare Life Sciences Conference on February 12, 2025, at 4:40 PM ET. The company is listed on Nasdaq under the symbol CYTK.

news.headline: Analyst from Jefferies suggests that Google should ramp up spending.
Sing for Hope and He Gets Us team up to bring artist-designed pianos to New Orleans from Feb 4-20. Jon Batiste involved.
news.summary: Sing for Hope Pianos New Orleans will commence during the Big Game Weekend in 2025, featuring the unveiling of He Gets Us' presentation at Jon Batiste's Love Riot Festival. The initiative will be announced by Sing for Hope in partnership with the He Gets Us project in New Orleans on February 5, 2025.

news.headline: US Marine Corps starts 250th birthday celebration at Super Bowl LIX in New Orleans, first of many events.
news.summary: A year-long celebration marking the United States Marine Corps' 250th birthday begins in New Orleans, starting with Super Bowl LIX. The event honors the USMC's service with a series of events throughout the year. The festivities will commence in New Orleans, with various celebrations planned to mark this significant milestone for the USMC.

news.headline: F.C.C. reveals CBS interview with Kamala Harris from "60 Minutes," at the center of Trump's lawsuit, showed edited answer on Israel.
news.summary: The lawsuit filed by President Trump revolves around an interview featured on "60 Minutes" that shows a more detailed version of Ms. Harris's response on Israel.

news.headline: AI pricing platform Quicklizard to be acquired by Riverwood Capital.
news.summary: An Israeli-based AI-powered dynamic pricing platform, Quicklizard, has recently finalized an agreement to be acquired by Riverwood Capital. This acquisition marks a significant move in the industry, involving cutting-edge technology in pricing strategies. The acquisition agreement between Quicklizard and Riverwood Capital indicates a notable financial transaction, with precise numbers undisclosed at this time. This strategic development is poised to bring about changes in the business landscape, demonstrating the value and potential of AI technology in pricing solutions.

news.headline: SilverStone Health recognized for gold standard Palliative/Hospice care, earning Heart Failure certification from American Heart Association.
news.summary: SilverStone Health recently achieved certification from the American Heart Association for Palliative/Hospice Heart Failure care, showcasing their commitment to quality services. This recognition, received on Feb. 5, 2025, highlights SilverStone Health's dedication to providing top-notch healthcare. The American Heart Association, a prominent nonprofit organization, acknowledged SilverStone Health's exceptional standards in heart failure care. This certification demonstrates SilverStone Health's expertise in this area and emphasizes their focus on delivering superior service to patients. A noteworthy accomplishment for SilverStone Health, this certification signifies their excellence in providing specialized care for individuals with heart failure.

news.headline: Goldman Sachs analyst predicts IBM stock can hit $275, noting company's underappreciation in TMT sector, projecting over 5% revenue growth from 2025-2027.
news.summary: Goldman Sachs analyst James Schneider shared insights on International Business Machines Corporation’s Investor Day held on February 4. The analyst reaffirmed a Buy rating and set a price target of $275, stating that the company is undervalued in the TMT sector and presents significant upside potential for long-term investors. Schneider projects IBM to achieve over 5% total revenue growth from 2025 to 2027, incorporating M&A activities, with pre-tax margin and free cash flow growth exceeding revenue growth. The analyst anticipates continuous stock appreciation as IBM aims for a sustained 10% long-term software revenue growth, surpassing their previous forecast of high-single digits for 2025-2027. Additionally, Schneider highlights that IBM has outlined a strong strategy for future growth.

news.headline: FS Investments' FS MVP Private Markets Fund hits $1 billion in assets after three years. Leading private equity fund focusing on US middle market companies.
news.summary: In Philadelphia on February 5, 2025, FS Investments, a prominent alternative investment manager, disclosed that their FS MVP Private Markets Fund, an ongoing private equity fund concentrating on private U.S. middle market companies, has successfully completed three years since its inception.

news.headline: West Hill Family Dental in Rocky Hill, CT, awarded as a top-rated dentist for 2025 by patients on online platforms.
news.summary: Incredible ratings and feedback from patients on online platforms have led West Hill Family Dental in Rocky Hill, Connecticut, to receive a prestigious award. The recognition, announced on Feb. 5, 2025, underscores the exceptional service provided by the state-of-the-art dental practice.

news.headline: Soloviev Foundation Gallery showcases African & Afrodiasporic art for Black History Month with historical sculptures and portraits.
news.summary: A new exhibition in New York showcases a collection of historical sculptures from continental Africa alongside striking portraits by esteemed Harlem Renaissance photographer James Van Der Zee. The exhibition is taking place at the Soloviev Foundation Gallery. This presentation highlights the cultural heritage of Africa and its diaspora, featuring a total of [number] sculptures and [number] portraits. The exhibition aims to celebrate the rich artistic traditions of these regions and offers a unique opportunity to appreciate both the historical sculptures and the captivating photography by James Van Der Zee.

news.headline: Boston University offers to purchase all outstanding taxable fixed rate bonds in connection with issuing tax-exempt bonds.
news.summary: On February 5, 2025, the Trustees of Boston University revealed their plan to buy back all of the University's existing taxable fixed-rate bonds as part of their strategy to issue tax-exempt bonds. This move is a significant step in the University's financial strategy and highlights their commitment to optimizing their debt structure.

news.headline: Fintech company Fiserv's stock surges after reporting earnings, breaking out in the market.
news.summary: Financial technology company Fiserv released its earnings report ahead of schedule on Wednesday and saw a significant increase in its stock price. The fintech stock surged after the earnings were announced.

news.headline: Read the Stock Market Today column for market trends, top stocks to buy, and more. Stay updated with Investor's Business Daily.
news.summary: Read the latest Stock Market Today column for updates on market trends and to identify top stocks for purchase or monitoring purposes. Stay informed with insightful analysis on stock market news. Visit Investor's Business Daily for more information.

news.headline: MicroStrategy rebranded and paused its 12-week bitcoin buying spree before reporting Q4 results.
news.summary: MicroStrategy released its fourth-quarter financial results on Wednesday, following a 12-week period where the software company engaged in a significant buying spree of Bitcoin. This purchase activity was paused just before the results were announced.

news.headline: PEPPM awards Amazon Business contract for 800,000+ products, streamlining bids for public agencies.
news.summary: In Milton, Pennsylvania on February 5, 2025, PEPPM, a national public-sector purchasing cooperative, announced the availability of over 800,000 products from the Amazon Business store for public agencies to purchase without the need for local bidding. This move aims to streamline purchasing processes and promote efficiency in procurement, providing agencies access to a wide array of products.

news.headline: Microchip Technology Inc. has struggled with a 38% stock decline in the past year. Despite challenges, company may benefit from AI demand.
news.summary: Microchip Technology Inc. plays a supportive role in AI applications with its microcontrollers and analog chips despite not being directly tied to artificial intelligence. The company has seen its stock decline by over 38% in the past year due to challenges like restructuring plans and revenue guidance cuts. However, examples like Palantir Technologies have shown that the AI sector is still promising. With the demand for AI applications likely to increase, Microchip might see a turnaround. This presents a risky but potentially exciting trade opportunity ahead of the company's earnings report.

news.headline: Nokia Corp buys back shares on 05.02.2025.
Rich Vallaster, CEM, DES appointed as Chair for CEIR Research Council for 2025, guiding exhibition industry intelligence.
news.summary: Renowned industry professional Rich Vallaster, holding certifications in CEM and DES, has been appointed as the 2025 Chair of the Center for Exhibition Industry by Personify and A2Z Events. The announcement was made in Austin, Texas on February 5, 2025. Vallaster's expertise and leadership will guide the future of exhibition industry intelligence.

news.headline: PROTEOR expands digital portfolio by acquiring Filament Innovations, leader in 3D printing for O&P industry.
news.summary: PROTEOR, based in DIJON, France, has recently acquired Filament Innovations, a prominent company specializing in 3D printing solutions for the Orthotics & Prosthetics (O&P) sector. This strategic move aims to bolster PROTEOR's digital portfolio as they continue to expand. The acquisition, finalized on Feb. 5, 2025, underscores PROTEOR’s commitment to enhancing its offerings.

news.headline: AmeriWater names Doug Lohse as CEO, a leader in water purification systems for dialysis and healthcare.
news.summary: On February 5, 2025, in Dayton, Ohio, AmeriWater, a prominent company specializing in water purification systems for dialysis, industrial, and healthcare sectors, appointed Doug Lohse as their new Chief Executive Officer. This major announcement marks a significant development in the company's leadership following the departure of the previous CEO. AmeriWater is known for its expertise in designing, manufacturing, installing, and providing water purification solutions for various critical applications. Doug Lohse's appointment brings a wealth of experience and knowledge to the role, setting a positive tone for the company's future endeavors.

news.headline: Neville Dental Studio in Scottsville, KY recognized as a top patient-rated dentist for 2025 by Find Local Doctors. Advanced technology used for smile protection, repair, and enhancement.
news.summary: A clinic in Scottsville, Kentucky, is renowned for its commitment to utilizing state-of-the-art dental technology to safeguard, mend, and improve smiles with exactness and attentiveness. As of February 5, 2025, Neville Dental Studio stands out for its advanced facilities and wide array of dental services.

news.headline: Impact of Trump's trade war on Bitcoin and Gold: Traditionally correlated as "safe havens", they now deviate due to Trump's policies.
news.summary: Historically, gold and Bitcoin have shown a correlation as safe-haven assets. However, this trend has shifted with the return of President Donald Trump to the political forefront.

news.headline: "MicroStrategy becomes "Strategy," keeping core business intact, embraces Bitcoin ethos with new logo." Characters: 106
news.summary: The company's fundamental business operations remain the same despite undergoing a cosmetic rebranding to align with the firm's supportive stance towards Bitcoin.

news.headline: Thursday's FX Option Expiries
Matthew J. Wildes, Esq., CPA recognized as a 2025 Pinnacle Professional of The Year by The Inner Circle for his impact on Tax Law and Planning.
news.summary: In Roseville, Minnesota on February 5, 2025, Matthew J. Wildes, a respected professional in tax law and planning, was recognized as the 2025 Pinnacle Professional of The Year in The Inner Circle. With a background as an Esq. and CPA, Wildes has made significant contributions to the field, solidifying his status as a leading figure in tax law.
